name: Vanta 777
description: A signature leather jacket cut from full-grain Italian hide. Mid-weight, hand-finished seams, and a silhouette that ages with you. Wear it once and it starts learning your body.

name: Choco 247
description: A sculptural cropped jacket in warm brown suede leather, designed with a high stand collar, structured shoulders, and dramatic gathered sleeves. The curved front panels create a corset-inspired silhouette, balancing soft texture with a strong editorial shape.
shortDescription: Cropped brown suede jacket with sculptural sleeves.

name: Kora 9090
description: A cropped suede leather jacket in a soft beige tone, designed with a clean collarless V-neck, front zip closure, and oversized patch pockets. Contrast stitching adds subtle structure, while the minimal cut gives it a refined everyday silhouette.
shortDescription: Cropped beige suede jacket with patch pockets.

name: Veyra 365
description: A black leather corset top with a sculpted waist, strapless neckline, and vertical panel detailing for a structured, modern silhouette.

name: Olive 222
description: A cropped dark olive jacket with a corduroy collar, slanted pockets, and statement hook closures for a clean utilitarian look.
shortDescription: Cropped olive jacket with hook closures.

name: Luxa 818
description: A cropped brown leather jacket with oversized lapels, front patch pockets, and ribbed cuffs for a bold bomber-inspired silhouette.

name: Obsi 404
description: A black pebbled leather weekender bag with structured top handles, a spacious rectangular shape, and refined metal details for elevated travel.

name: Kairo 1999
description: A black pebbled leather shoulder bag with structured top handles, a front belt detail, and polished metal hardware for a bold refined look.

name: Zyra in Brown
description: A large brown leather hobo bag with a soft curved handle, roomy body, and vintage texture for an effortless everyday look.

name: Zyra in Black
description: A weekender for people who travel light but well. Soft duffel construction, full-length zip, leather-wrapped grips. The bag that goes in the overhead bin and into the rest of your life.
